result.stdout:
Description:
  Git AI assistant

Usage:
  AiGit [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  commit-message  Generate and output a commit message
  commit          Generate a commit message and commit changes
  commit-push     Generate a commit message, commit, and push changes

commands.payload:
Description:
  Git AI assistant

Usage:
  AiGit [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  commit-message  Generate and output a commit message
  commit          Generate a commit message and commit changes
  commit-push     Generate a commit message, commit, and push changes

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate a commit message and commit changes

Usage:
  AiGit commit [options]

Options:
  --ai-cli <ai-cli>  The AI CLI to use (copilot or gemini).
  --no-stage         Do not stage changes before committing.
  -i, --interactive  Ask for confirmation before committing.
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
